releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 未完成的流行野心，依然炸裂
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成姿态发布新作，融合流行与嘻哈的实验性尝试，充满话题性与情感张力。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X drops an unfinished project blending pop and hip-hop with experimental flair, full of buzz and emotional intensity.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.summary: Kendrick Lamar 新专辑《KL7》延续其深刻的社会叙事与音乐实验，注定成为年度重磅。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Kendrick Lamar's 'KL7' continues his profound social storytelling and musical experimentation, destined to be a year-defining release.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: Don McLean 75年曼城现场，经典重现
releasedToday.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, a classic reborn
releasedToday.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场录音首次发布，捕捉了《American Pie》时代的原始能量与诗意。
releasedToday.summaryEn: First release of Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live recording, capturing the raw energy and poetry of the 'American Pie' era.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.summary: 德国电子音乐大师 Schiller 新作《Euphoria》延续其标志性的宏大氛围与情感叙事，适合沉浸式聆听。
releasedToday.summaryEn: German electronic maestro Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature grand atmospheres and emotional storytelling, perfect for immersive listening.

releasedToday.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedToday.highlight: Robin Trower 美国现场，蓝调吉他盛宴
releasedToday.highlightEn: Robin Trower live in the USA, a blues guitar feast
releasedToday.summary: Robin Trower 的美国现场专辑展现其精湛的蓝调吉他技艺，氛围迷幻而深情。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Robin Trower's US live album showcases his masterful blues guitar work, with a psychedelic and soulful atmosphere.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2026仓库系列最新现场
releasedToday.highlightEn: Latest Warehouse live release from Dave Matthews Band
releasedToday.summary: Dave Matthews Band 2025年里士满现场录音，收录于其标志性的Warehouse系列，充满即兴活力。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Dave Matthews Band's 2025 Richmond live recording, part of their iconic Warehouse series, brimming with improvisational energy.

releasedToday.title: RAVEPOP
releasedToday.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedToday.highlight: r u s s e l b u c k 的电子狂欢
releasedToday.highlightEn: r u s s e l b u c k's electronic rave
releasedToday.summary: 《RAVEPOP》以强劲节拍与实验音色打造一场电子音乐狂欢，适合舞池与耳机双重体验。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'RAVEPOP' delivers an electronic music rave with driving beats and experimental textures, perfect for both dancefloor and headphone listening.
